title: Kerala Budget Explorer
description: Experience the best of God's Own Country without breaking the bank. This carefully curated budget package covers the iconic backwaters of Alleppey and the scenic hill station of Munnar with comfortable yet affordable accommodation. Perfect for solo travelers and budget-conscious explorers wanting an authentic Kerala experience.
inclusions: 4 nights accommodation in budget guesthouses/homestays
Daily breakfast and dinner (MAP plan)
Alleppey houseboat day cruise (shared)
Air-conditioned vehicle transfers between destinations
Munnar tea garden guided tour
exclusions: Flights or train tickets to/from Cochin
Entry fees to monuments and national parks

days.title: Arrival in Cochin – Fort Kochi Heritage Walk
days.image: Fort Kochi Chinese fishing nets at sunset Kerala
activities: 2:00 PM - Arrive at Cochin airport/station, transfer to Fort Kochi guesthouse (45 min)
4:30 PM - Walk to Chinese Fishing Nets at Fort Kochi waterfront, watch evening fishing demonstration
6:30 PM - Stroll through Fort Kochi bazaar streets, visit St. Francis Church (oldest European church in India)

days.title: Mattancherry & Journey to Alleppey
days.image: Mattancherry Palace murals and Jew Town spice market Cochin
activities: 9:00 AM - Visit Mattancherry Palace (Dutch Palace) with stunning Kerala murals, ₹5 entry
11:00 AM - Explore Jew Town antique shops and Paradesi Synagogue area
2:00 PM - Drive to Alleppey (1.5 hrs), check in to guesthouse, evening walk to Alleppey Beach

days.title: Alleppey Backwaters Day Cruise
days.image: Alleppey backwaters houseboat morning view Kerala
activities: 8:00 AM - Board shared houseboat for full-day backwater cruise on Vembanad Lake
12:00 PM - Lunch served on the boat while floating through village canals
4:00 PM - Disembark and visit Alleppey Lighthouse (open 3–5 PM, ₹20 entry)

days.title: Munnar – Tea Gardens & Hills
days.image: Munnar tea gardens misty hills green slopes Kerala
activities: 7:00 AM - Drive from Alleppey to Munnar (4 hrs) through scenic Western Ghats
12:30 PM - Lunch stop at Adimali, continue to Munnar, check in to hotel
3:30 PM - Visit KDHP Tea Museum and tea factory tour, evening stroll at Munnar town market

days.title: Munnar Sightseeing & Departure
days.image: Eravikulam National Park Nilgiri tahr grasslands Munnar
activities: 7:30 AM - Early morning visit to Eravikulam National Park (Rajamalai) to spot Nilgiri tahr (entry ₹125)
10:00 AM - Drive to Mattupetty Dam and Echo Point, enjoy the scenic reservoir views
1:00 PM - Check out, drive back to Cochin (4 hrs) for onward journey

title: Kerala Family Fun Package
description: A perfectly designed family holiday that introduces children and adults alike to Kerala's diverse landscapes and experiences. From the exciting wildlife encounters at Periyar to the magical houseboat float through backwaters and the refreshing coolness of Munnar's tea gardens, every day promises new discoveries. The package includes family-friendly accommodation with extra beds and child-friendly meal options.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in family rooms (hotel/resort)
Daily breakfast and dinner
Private AC vehicle for all transfers
Alleppey private houseboat (overnight stay)
Periyar Lake boat safari and guided nature walk
exclusions: Entry fees to Eravikulam NP and other monuments

days.title: Arrival in Cochin – Fort Kochi Discovery
days.image: Fort Kochi waterfront family walk Kerala heritage
activities: 1:00 PM - Arrive Cochin, transfer to Fort Kochi hotel (45 min)
4:00 PM - Family heritage walk: Chinese Fishing Nets, Santa Cruz Basilica, Fort Kochi beach
6:30 PM - Kerala Kathakali dance performance at Kerala Kathakali Centre (booking required, 7 PM show)

days.title: Cochin to Thekkady – Wildlife Country
days.image: Periyar Lake boat safari wild elephants Western Ghats
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive from Cochin to Thekkady/Periyar (4.5 hrs) with scenic mountain roads
1:30 PM - Arrive Thekkady, check in to resort, freshen up
3:30 PM - Periyar Lake boat safari (1.5 hrs) – spot elephants, bison, deer from the boat

days.title: Periyar Wildlife & Munnar Bound
days.image: Periyar Nature Walk spice plantation Thekkady Kerala
activities: 7:00 AM - Early morning guided nature walk in Periyar Tiger Reserve buffer zone (2 hrs)
10:00 AM - Visit a spice plantation near Kumily – smell and learn about cardamom, pepper, vanilla
12:30 PM - Drive to Munnar (2.5 hrs), check in to hill resort, evening at leisure

days.title: Munnar – Tea, Dams & Hills
days.image: Munnar Mattupetty Dam reservoir green hills family
activities: 9:00 AM - Visit KDHP Tea Museum followed by a working tea factory tour (kids love the machinery)
11:30 AM - Drive to Mattupetty Dam for speed boating and serene reservoir views (boating ₹100/person)
3:00 PM - Stop at Echo Point and Kundala Lake, return to Munnar for evening market walk

days.title: Alleppey – Overnight Houseboat
days.image: Alleppey houseboat overnight backwaters Kerala family
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive from Munnar to Alleppey (4 hrs)
12:30 PM - Check in to private houseboat, cast off into Vembanad Lake backwaters
7:00 PM - Freshly cooked Kerala dinner on houseboat, overnight stay on the waters

days.title: Backwater Morning & Cochin Departure
days.image: Kerala backwaters morning mist sunrise houseboat
activities: 7:00 AM - Sunrise on the backwaters, morning tea/coffee on the deck
9:30 AM - Disembark at Alleppey, drive to Cochin airport/station (1.5 hrs)
11:30 AM - Drop at Cochin airport/station for onward journey

title: Kerala Romantic Escape
description: Crafted for couples seeking an intimate and enchanting escape, this honeymoon package weaves together Kerala's most romantic landscapes. Drift through shimmering backwaters on a private luxury houseboat, unwind at Varkala's dramatic clifftop beaches, and immerse in candlelit Ayurvedic spa sessions. Every moment is designed to celebrate love amidst God's Own Country.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in romantic resorts and luxury houseboat
Daily breakfast and dinner with candlelit dinner on houseboat night
Private AC vehicle with decorated car on arrival
Couple Ayurvedic massage session (60 min each)
Private overnight houseboat on Vembanad Lake
exclusions: Optional activities not mentioned in itinerary

days.title: Arrival in Cochin – Romance Begins
days.image: Fort Kochi waterfront sunset couple romantic Kerala
activities: 2:00 PM - Welcome with flower-decorated car at Cochin airport, transfer to Fort Kochi boutique heritage hotel
5:00 PM - Romantic evening walk along Fort Kochi waterfront, Chinese Fishing Nets at sunset
7:30 PM - Candlelit dinner at a Fort Kochi rooftop restaurant with Kerala coastal cuisine

days.title: Fort Kochi to Alleppey – Houseboat Heaven
days.image: Luxury houseboat private deck Alleppey backwaters Kerala honeymoon
activities: 9:30 AM - Leisurely morning in Fort Kochi, quick visit to Mattancherry Synagogue and spice market
12:00 PM - Drive to Alleppey (1.5 hrs), board private luxury houseboat
7:00 PM - Sunset cruise on Vembanad Lake, private dinner with Kerala seafood spread on the deck

days.title: Backwaters & Journey to Varkala
days.image: Kerala backwaters morning mist houseboat couple sunrise
activities: 7:00 AM - Wake up to misty backwater sunrise, morning tea on the private deck
10:00 AM - Disembark, drive to Varkala cliff beach resort (2.5 hrs)
4:00 PM - Couples' Ayurvedic massage at resort spa, evening stroll on Varkala North Cliff

days.title: Varkala Cliff Beach & Leisure
days.image: Varkala cliff beach sunset Kerala Arabian Sea romantic
activities: 8:00 AM - Breakfast with Arabian Sea cliff view, leisurely morning at beach
11:00 AM - Explore Varkala cliff's boutique shops and cafes, visit Janardhanaswamy Temple
6:00 PM - Sunset yoga session on the cliff (optional), romantic dinner at cliffside restaurant

days.title: Kovalam Beach & Spa Day
days.image: Kovalam lighthouse beach sunset Kerala couple
activities: 10:00 AM - Drive to Kovalam (45 min), check in to beachside resort
12:00 PM - Relaxing beach time at crescent-shaped Lighthouse Beach, swimming and sunbathing
5:30 PM - Visit Kovalam Lighthouse for panoramic views, couples' Ayurvedic treatment at resort

days.title: Trivandrum & Departure
days.image: Trivandrum Padmanabhaswamy Temple Kerala cultural morning
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive to Trivandrum (40 min), visit Padmanabhaswamy Temple complex (outer view)
10:00 AM - Napier Museum and Natural History Museum, Trivandrum Zoo (optional)
1:00 PM - Transfer to Trivandrum airport for onward journey

title: Kerala Wilderness Adventure
description: Designed for thrill-seekers and nature lovers, this adventure package takes you through Kerala's wild heart. Trek through cloud-kissed peaks in Wayanad, raft on wild rivers, go on nocturnal wildlife safaris in Periyar, and explore prehistoric cave art at Edakkal. Each day brings a new adrenaline-fueled encounter with Kerala's extraordinary biodiversity.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in eco-lodges and forest camps
Daily breakfast and dinner
Chembra Peak trek with certified guide
Periyar bamboo rafting and border hiking
Private 4WD vehicle for all transfers

days.title: Arrive Calicut – Drive to Wayanad
days.image: Wayanad green forests western ghats misty mountains Kerala
activities: 1:00 PM - Arrive Calicut, drive to Wayanad via scenic Thamarassery Churam ghat road (2.5 hrs)
4:00 PM - Check in to eco-lodge near Kalpetta, brief orientation with trek guide
6:00 PM - Evening nature walk around the lodge, spot endemic birds and butterflies in surrounding forest

days.title: Chembra Peak Trek – 2,100m Summit
days.image: Chembra Peak trek heart shaped lake Wayanad Kerala summit
activities: 5:30 AM - Early start with packed breakfast, drive to Meppadi (30 min) for Chembra Peak trek permit
6:30 AM - Begin 8 km trek to Chembra Peak (2,100 m) via heart-shaped Hridayathadakam lake (4–5 hrs ascent)
3:00 PM - Descend, reach base by 6 PM, hot dinner at eco-lodge, campfire sharing trek stories

days.title: Edakkal Caves & Wayanad Wildlife
days.image: Edakkal Caves prehistoric rock carvings Wayanad Kerala
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive to Edakkal Caves (1 hr), climb 1 km rocky trail to see 6,000-year-old rock engravings
11:00 AM - Visit Wayanad Wildlife Sanctuary at Muthanga (jeep safari, ₹500, 2 hrs, spot bison and elephants)
4:00 PM - Drive to Thekkady/Periyar (3.5 hrs), check in to forest lodge

days.title: Periyar – Bamboo Rafting & Border Trek
days.image: Periyar bamboo rafting river Western Ghats adventure Kerala
activities: 6:00 AM - Periyar Tiger Reserve bamboo rafting on Periyar River (5 km, 3 hrs, advance booking essential)
11:00 AM - Periyar border hiking trail with forest guide (4 hrs, spot wild boar, langur, Malabar hornbill)
6:00 PM - Village walk around Kumily market, sample local spices and buy cardamom

days.title: Athirappilly Waterfalls & River Rafting
days.image: Athirappilly waterfalls Chalakudy river Kerala adventure
activities: 7:00 AM - Drive from Thekkady to Athirappilly (3.5 hrs) via Chalakudy
11:30 AM - Visit Athirappilly Falls (Kerala's Niagara, 80-ft cascade) and nearby Vazhachal Falls
2:30 PM - White-water rafting on Chalakudy River (Grade II–III, 2 hrs), drive to Cochin (1.5 hrs)

days.title: Cochin Mangrove Kayak & Departure
days.image: Cochin backwater mangrove kayaking morning Kerala
activities: 7:00 AM - Sunrise mangrove kayaking tour in Cochin backwaters (2 hrs, guide included)
10:00 AM - Quick breakfast, freshen up, optional visit to Marine Drive promenade
1:00 PM - Transfer to Cochin airport/station for onward journey

title: Kerala Royal Luxury Journey
description: Immerse yourself in the very finest Kerala has to offer through this ultra-premium luxury journey. Stay at award-winning heritage hotels and five-star resorts, float through the backwaters on a exclusive premium houseboat with a private chef, and indulge in personalised Ayurvedic treatments at world-class wellness spas. Every detail from arrival to departure is handled by a dedicated private concierge.
inclusions: 6 nights in 5-star/luxury heritage properties with premium rooms
All meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner) with premium Kerala cuisine
Private chauffeur-driven luxury vehicle throughout
Exclusive private houseboat (2 nights) with personal chef and butler
Daily Ayurvedic spa treatments (90 min per day) and wellness consultation
exclusions: Personal shopping and additional spa treatments beyond included ones

days.title: Arrival in Cochin – Heritage Grandeur
days.image: Fort Kochi heritage hotel colonial architecture luxury Kerala
activities: 2:00 PM - Private transfer from Cochin airport in luxury sedan to award-winning CGH Earth Brunton Boatyard or similar
5:00 PM - Exclusive guided heritage walk of Fort Kochi with a historian, access private art galleries
7:30 PM - Welcome dinner at rooftop restaurant with panoramic harbour views and live classical music

days.title: Cochin to Kumarakom – Backwater Luxury
days.image: Kumarakom Lake Resort infinity pool Vembanad Lake Kerala luxury
activities: 9:00 AM - Morning visit to Mattancherry Palace with private art historian, Paradesi Synagogue
12:30 PM - Drive to Kumarakom (2 hrs) to luxury lake resort (Kumarakom Lake Resort or CGH Earth)
4:00 PM - Check in to premium lake-facing villa, sunset cruise on Vembanad Lake in private boat

days.title: Exclusive Backwaters & Ayurveda
days.image: Kumarakom luxury houseboat Ayurvedic spa wellness Kerala
activities: 8:00 AM - Bird watching in Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary (resident and migratory birds) with expert naturalist
11:00 AM - 90-min Ayurvedic Shirodhara and Abhyanga treatment at resort spa
3:00 PM - Board premium private houseboat, cruise through narrow village canals of Kuttanad

days.title: Private Houseboat to Alleppey
days.image: Premium houseboat luxury dining Kerala backwaters sunset
activities: 7:00 AM - Wake up on the waters, private butler serves breakfast on deck
10:00 AM - Cruise through rice paddy lined canals, stop at a traditional fisherman's village for guided walk
7:00 PM - Gourmet dinner prepared by onboard chef using fresh local ingredients and spices

days.title: Munnar – Tea Country Elegance
days.image: Munnar luxury tea estate bungalow hills Kerala misty
activities: 9:00 AM - Disembark at Alleppey, drive to Munnar luxury tea estate bungalow (4 hrs)
2:00 PM - Private tour of KDHP tea estate with master blender, participate in tea tasting session
5:00 PM - Guided walk through rose garden and tea hills at sunset, private dinner in the estate bungalow

days.title: Thekkady & Kerala Spice Country
days.image: Thekkady spice plantation luxury resort Periyar Western Ghats
activities: 7:00 AM - Private Periyar Tiger Reserve jeep safari (3 hrs, exclusive vehicle with naturalist guide)
11:00 AM - Luxury spice plantation bungalow lunch with organic farm-to-table meal
4:00 PM - Exclusive Kathakali and Kalaripayattu private performance arranged at resort

days.title: Kovalam Beach & Grand Departure
days.image: Kovalam luxury beach resort infinity pool Arabian Sea Kerala
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive to Kovalam luxury beach resort (5 hrs), check in to sea-facing premium villa
12:00 PM - Private beach butler service, water sports or leisure swim in Arabian Sea
7:00 PM - Grand farewell dinner at beachside restaurant, transfer to Trivandrum airport

title: Kerala Cultural Heritage Tour
description: Dive deep into the rich cultural tapestry of Kerala with this thoughtfully curated heritage tour. Explore ancient temples, witness classical art forms like Kathakali and Kalaripayattu, marvel at Portuguese and Dutch colonial architecture in Fort Kochi, and experience the living traditions of temple towns like Thrissur and Guruvayur. This journey reveals the soul of Kerala through its art, architecture, and spirituality.
inclusions: 4 nights accommodation in heritage hotels
Daily breakfast and dinner
Private vehicle for all transfers
Kathakali performance ticket and make-up watching session
Guided tour of Mattancherry Palace and Jewish Synagogue
exclusions: Personal expenses and donations at temples

days.title: Arrival – Fort Kochi Colonial Heritage
days.image: Fort Kochi colonial architecture St Francis Church Kerala heritage
activities: 1:00 PM - Arrive Cochin, transfer to Fort Kochi heritage hotel
3:30 PM - Guided walk: St. Francis Church (1503, oldest European church in India), Santa Cruz Basilica
7:00 PM - Kathakali performance at Kerala Kathakali Centre – watch artists apply traditional makeup from 6 PM

days.title: Mattancherry & Thrissur Temple Town
days.image: Mattancherry Palace Dutch Palace murals Kerala cultural
activities: 8:30 AM - Mattancherry Palace (Dutch Palace) – stunning murals depicting Ramayana and Mahabharata
10:30 AM - Paradesi Synagogue (Jew Town) and antique spice market exploration
2:00 PM - Drive to Thrissur (2.5 hrs), visit Vadakkunnathan Temple (ancient Shiva temple, no camera inside)

days.title: Guruvayur – Krishna Temple & Elephant Sanctuary
days.image: Guruvayur Krishna Temple procession elephants Kerala
activities: 7:00 AM - Early morning drive to Guruvayur (1 hr) for 8 AM darshan at Guruvayurappan Temple
10:00 AM - Visit Punnathur Kotta Elephant Sanctuary (50+ temple elephants, photo allowed)
3:00 PM - Return to Thrissur, attend Sangeetha Nataka Akademi performance (if scheduled) or visit Kerala Lalithakala Akademi gallery

days.title: Palakkad – Tippu's Fort & Nenmara Vallanghy
days.image: Palakkad Fort Tippu Sultan architecture Kerala cultural
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive to Palakkad (1.5 hrs), visit Palakkad Fort (Tippu Sultan's 18th century fort)
11:00 AM - Explore Kalpathy village (UNESCO-listed brahmin agraharams, ancient layout preserved)
3:00 PM - Visit Dhoni Waterfalls and Malampuzha Dam with garden, return to Cochin (2.5 hrs)

days.title: Kochi Museum & Departure
days.image: Kochi Kerala Museum cultural art exhibits heritage
activities: 9:00 AM - Visit Kerala Museum in Cochin (traditional architecture, art, historical artifacts)
11:00 AM - Marine Drive walk, visit Kerala Piravi Memorial and Crafts Village
1:00 PM - Transfer to Cochin airport for onward journey

title: Munnar Weekend Retreat
description: Escape the city heat for a refreshing weekend in Munnar, Kerala's most beloved hill station. Breathe in the cool mountain air, wander through endless emerald tea gardens, spot the rare Nilgiri tahr at Eravikulam National Park, and watch morning mist roll over the Western Ghats. This short and sweet getaway is perfect for a quick recharge.
inclusions: 2 nights accommodation at a hill resort in Munnar
Daily breakfast and dinner
Shared vehicle transfers from/to Cochin
Tea factory and estate guided tour
Echo Point and Mattupetty Dam visit
exclusions: Entry fee to Eravikulam NP (₹125 per person)

days.title: Arrival – Into the Tea Hills
days.image: Munnar tea estate arrival hill resort Kerala weekend
activities: 7:00 AM - Depart Cochin by shared vehicle (4 hrs via scenic NH66 and Adimali route)
11:30 AM - Arrive Munnar, check in to hill resort, freshen up with mountain view lunch
3:00 PM - Visit KDHP Tea Museum and working tea factory (learn how Munnar tea is processed), evening town walk

days.title: Eravikulam & Scenic Peaks
days.image: Eravikulam National Park Nilgiri tahr misty mountains Munnar
activities: 7:00 AM - Drive to Eravikulam National Park for early morning Nilgiri tahr spotting (8 AM opening)
10:00 AM - Mattupetty Dam – speed boating (₹100 pp) and views of the sprawling reservoir
1:00 PM - Drive to Echo Point (12 km from Munnar) and Kundala Lake, evening at leisure in Munnar bazaar

days.title: Tata Tea Gardens & Departure
days.image: Munnar top station viewpoint dawn tea gardens Kerala
activities: 6:30 AM - Sunrise drive to Top Station (32 km, 1,700 m) for panoramic views of Tamil Nadu plains
9:30 AM - Leisurely breakfast at resort, visit Rose Garden and Chinnakanal Waterfalls
12:00 PM - Check out, drive back to Cochin (4 hrs) for onward journey
